caption: XBID continuous-intraday liquidity, monthly means. Orders per hour grow 15× from pre-IDA (~920) to DA15/ID15 (~13,900); fill rate falls from 5.2% to 2.7% as granularity finer; trade-price dispersion peaks at DA60/ID15 (€11.3/MWh) and normalises at MTU15-DA — concordant with the structural-markup pattern in Fig 2.
